build.buildCommand: COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1 php composer.phar install --no-dev --no-scripts --optimize-autoloader && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
